diagrams.title: Saddle Point Shape in 3D
diagrams.description: Shows the Lagrangian surface L(x,λ) as a saddle shape - concave up in λ direction, concave down in x direction
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how saddle point represents minimization in primal direction and maximization in dual direction

diagrams.title: Primal-Dual Feasible Regions
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between primal feasible set and dual feasible region
diagrams.purpose: Understand how dual provides bounds on primal and when strong duality (zero gap) occurs

diagrams.title: KKT Conditions Diagram
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing intersection of KKT conditions for optimality
diagrams.purpose: Remember all KKT conditions must be satisfied simultaneously for optimality
